web.title: Jean-Georges Miami Tropic Residences | Official Website
web.description: Private and semi-private elevators · Spacious balconies with glass railings · Airy, open living spaces with 10ft - 11ft glass windows · Residence kitchens inspired ...
web.markdown:
# Taste is Everything

In Miami’s tropical paradise, a residential retreat takes root, blending with an urban tapestry of art and culture, where the legendary Jean-Georges expands his culinary mastery into the realm of residential lifestyle.

## An Invitation to Live Larger

Magnificently designed interiors by Yabu Pushelberg reflect the lush landscape outdoors, with spacious layouts and harmonious color palettes.

![](https://miamitropic.com/uploads/images/building-new.svg)

## A Place to Belong

From inside to out, Miami Tropic’s architecture and design form a strong connection between the building and the people who live there.

![](https://miamitropic.com/uploads/images/building-new.svg)

LEVEL 49

Rooftop Skydeck

Pool with panoramic bay and city views, archival library, rooftop bar, private dining room, and lounge.

7.2

0

LEVEL 48

Penthouse COLLECTION

Exquisite penthouses boasting breathtaking, panoramic views, private elevators for unparalleled convenience, and meticulously crafted, luxurious finishes that epitomize the pinnacle of sophistication and comfort.

10

5

LEVELS 9–47

Residences

Luxury residences with floor-to-ceiling windows, sweeping views, kitchens inspired by Jean-Georges, and spacious balconies.

- Private and semi-private elevators
- Spacious balconies with glass railings
- Airy, open living spaces with 10ft - 11ft glass windows
- Residence kitchens inspired by Michelin-starred Chef Jean-Georges
- Finished primary bedroom closets
- Provisions for motorized shades\*

41.8

40

LEVEL 8

Pool & Restaurant

Resort-style pool with private cabanas, gardens, kids’ pool, outdoor theater, kitchen, lounge, and indoor/outdoor restaurant by Jean-Georges for residents only.

- Golf Simulator
- Kids, Teen, and Game Room
- Outdoor Theatre
- Outdoor Kitchen

82

75

LEVEL 7

Fitness & Spa

Indoor and outdoor fitness center with treatment rooms, saunas, plunge pools, squash court, yoga studio, juice bar, and more.

- Fitness Reception
- Changing Rooms
- Juice Bar
- Steam Room & Infrared Sauna
- Cold Plunge
- Wellness Space

84.5

77

LEVEL 5

Coworking & Entertainment

Generous coworking area with podcast studio space, private dining room adjacent to an exterior court, residents’ lounge, multi-function room and a PDR .

- Podcast Recording Studio
- Business Lounge & Coworking with Conference Rooms
- Multi-Function Room
- Art Gallery
- Chef’s Kitchen
- Residents’ Lounge
- Bar Lounge
- Sculpture Garden

90.7

80

LEVEL 2

LOBBY

Private drive-up porte-cochère with dedicated valet, seamless drop-off at reception, concierge desk and mailroom.

- Stunning Lobby designed by Yabu Pushelberg
- Tropical Garden
- Reception
- Mail Room
- 24/7 Concierge
- 24/7 Valet
- Secured Packaging Room
- Jean-Georges Mini-Market

96.2

90

GROUND FLOOR

Retail & Dining

One-of-a-kind ground-floor retail with Jean-Georges’ inaugural abc kitchens in Miami.

99.3

96

## Epicenter of Culture

The museums, galleries, and plentiful public art in the Design District are mere blocks away.

web.markdown:
![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image01.png?v=78c52ea7)

The legendary two Michelin-starred chef Jean-Georges' expansion of his mastery of gourmet culinary experiences into the realm of residential lifestyle in the heart of Miami’s Design District.

[En español](https://es.tropicresidences.miami/)

[⬆︎](https://tropicresidences.miami/#gototop)

[![#home](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image13.png?v=78c52ea7)](https://tropicresidences.miami/#home)

49 Stories / 329 Residences of 1, 2, 3 & 4 Bedroom ConfigurationsDeveloped by Terra & Lion Development Group. Designed by Arquitectonica.

## **[Residences](https://tropicresidences.miami/\#residences)**  **[Amenities](https://tropicresidences.miami/\#amenities)**  **[Floor Plans](https://tropicresidences.miami/\#floorplans)**  **[Location](https://tropicresidences.miami/\#location)**  **[The team](https://tropicresidences.miami/\#team)**  **[Prices & Payment Plan](https://tropicresidences.miami/\#prices)**  **[Contact Us](https://tropicresidences.miami/\#contact)**

## Delivery 2028

![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=78c52ea7)

![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=78c52ea7)

## LUXURY RESIDENCES

A nestled sanctuary amidst the pulse of city life of Miami’s Design District, the residences

embody contemporary elegance and are designed to create memorable moments.All residences will include private and semi-private residence elevator vestibules, spacious balconies with glass railings, immersive 180-degree views of Biscayne Bay, Miami Design District and Downtown, airy, open living spaces with 10'– 11' ceilings and floor-to-ceiling glass windows, residence kitchens inspired by Michelin-starred Chef Jean-Georges, finished primary bedroom closets, provisions for motorized shades, upper countertop with natural stone slab, Yohen Border red-brown ceramic tile mosaic backsplash, Gaggenau stainless appliance package with panel-integrated refrigerator and dishwasher, shower and tubs with vertical clay-rose toned ceramic tile, Gessi brushed nickel premium finish plumbing fixtures, Volcano Red Granite countertops, Light Beachwood finish Italian wood vanity cabinetry, and much more!

Click the photos for more details

### Spectacular Common Areas

## Luxury Amenities

From day to night, Miami Tropic offers a thoughtfully curated and diverse selection of world-class amenities and services that are designed to seamlessly fold into every aspect of our residents’ lifestyle!Private restaurant on pool level for residents and gourmet food & beverage programming throughout building by world-renowned chef Jean-Georges, design by Yabu Pushelberg, specialty entertaining and catering menus, pantry stocking and in-residence dining services curated by Jean-Georges,

private second-level drive-up porte-cochère with dedicated valet and seamless drop-off, sustainably minded with Florida Green Building Coalition design, a crosswalk that leads directly to Miami’s Design District, stunning Lobby, 24/7 Concierge and valet parking, Business Lounge, Multi-Function Room, Art Gallery, Chef’s Kitchen,

Residents’ Lounge, Juice Bar, Steam Room, Infrared Sauna, Wet Spa Hot & Cold Plunge, Fitness Studio, Massage Rooms, Resort-Style Pool & Deck, Outdoor Theatre and Lounge & Outdoor Kitchen, Indoor/Outdoor Dining & Bar, Kids’ Room, Golf Simulator, Sky Bar Lounge, and more!

Click the photos for more details

![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image03.jpg?v=78c52ea7)

### experience and lifestyle

By day and by night, Miami Tropic offers a diverse and carefully curated selection of first-class amenities and services, designed to seamlessly integrate into every aspect of its residents' lifestyles.With a private poolside restaurant and a culinary program led by world-renowned chef Jean-Georges, the building offers exclusive dining experiences that include entertainment menus, personalized catering, pantry stocking, and in-residence dining.Designed by Yabu Pushelberg, each space combines contemporary sophistication with the vibrant spirit of Miami, offering a residential experience that transcends the everyday.

Click the photos for more details

### Incredible Location

Building Address:

[3501 NE 1st Ave, Miami, FL 33137](https://maps.app.goo.gl/Aj5XANzEj4sbAdf39)

\- Brickell: 25-minute drive\- Downtown: 18-minute drive\- Wynwood: 6-minute drive\- Miami Beaches: 19-minute drive\- Miami Airport: 16-minute drive\- Key Biscayne: 19-minute drive

* * *

### Between Midtown and the Design District

Located at the intersection of art, design, and urban living, Tropic Residences connects the modern energy of Midtown with the sophistication of the Design District, surrounded by contemporary architecture, luxury shopping, and a vibrant cultural scene.

![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image02.jpg?v=78c52ea7)

![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=78c52ea7)

## THE TEAM

**DEVELOPERS**

Terra was launched in 2001. The firm has played a pivotal role in bringing new prosperity to existing and emerging communities. The properties in their portfolio are purpose-built, and have successfully served as catalysts for their given areas and inspired future growth. Some of their most renowned Miami condos include **[Mr. C Residences](https://miamiresidential.com/mrcresidences)**, **[Five Park Miami Beach](https://miamiresidential.com/fiveparkmiamibeach/)**, **[Glass Miami Beach](https://miamiresidential.com/glass/)**, **[Grove at Grand Bay](https://miamiresidential.com/groveatgrandbay/)**, **[Eighty Seven Park](https://miamiresidential.com/eightysevenpark)** and **[Park Grove.](https://miamiresidential.com/oneparkgrove/)**Lion Development Group is a full service real estate firm, with vast experience in the following segments of the real estate industry: manufacturing, multi-family, mixed use development, retail, commercial, full service development and construction management.

**ARCHITECT**

Since its establishment in 1977, ARQUITECTONICA swiftly garnered attention and praise from both critics and the public, thanks to its daring contemporary style synonymous with a revival in Miami's cityscape. Under the guidance of Principals Bernardo Fort-Brescia and Laurinda Spear, Arquitectonica continues to innovate in design, employing novel materials, geometries, patterns, and hues to pioneer a fresh form of humane modern design worldwide. Today, Arquitectonica's influence extends globally, with projects spanning 59 countries across five continents. Renowned for its avant-garde approach, the firm has amassed numerous design accolades and its pioneering projects have been showcased in various museums and institutions.

* * *

### INTERIOR DESIGN

## Yabu Pushelberg

Yabu Pushelberg is a multidisciplinary design firm focused on creating exceptional experiences and brand identities through cohesive ideation, design, and curation. Over 40 years of thoughtful work have positioned founders George Yabu and Glenn Pushelberg as prominent figures in various design fields. Starting as an interior design studio, their Toronto and New York offices now cover architecture, landscapes, interiors, lighting, furniture, objects, textiles, branding, and graphics. This holistic approach, combined with their narrative-driven design style, has transformed Yabu Pushelberg into a global leader in modern luxury design.

![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=78c52ea7)

![](https://tropicresidences.miami/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=78c52ea7)
